description: Advanced access control analytics, login security monitoring, RBAC evaluation performance, and API access pattern analysis for Grafana platform administrators.

panels.description: Percentage of login attempts resulting in success (non-4xx response)
panels.title: Login Success Rate

panels.description: Failed login attempts per minute. Spikes may indicate brute force attacks.
panels.title: Failed Logins / min

panels.description: Number of currently active users on the Grafana instance.
panels.title: Active Users

panels.description: Total number of registered users across the Grafana instance.
panels.title: Total Users

panels.description: Total number of organizations configured in Grafana.
panels.title: Total Organizations

panels.description: P95 latency of RBAC access evaluation. High values slow every API request.
panels.title: RBAC Eval Latency P95

panels.description: Login attempt timeline. Correlate failed login spikes with potential security incidents.
panels.title: Login Activity Over Time

panels.description: Breakdown of authentication error types. 401=bad credentials, 403=forbidden, 429=rate limited.
panels.title: Authentication Error Breakdown

panels.description: API traffic distribution by functional category. Shows which Grafana capabilities are most utilized.
panels.title: API Request Rate by Category

panels.description: Server errors by API category. Identifies which platform capabilities are degraded.
panels.title: API Errors by Category

panels.description: Rate of RBAC permission evaluations. Correlates with API request rate.
panels.title: RBAC Evaluation Rate

panels.description: RBAC evaluation latency percentiles. This adds to every authenticated API call.
panels.title: RBAC Evaluation Latency

panels.description: What percentage of total request latency is spent on RBAC evaluation. High values indicate RBAC is a bottleneck.
panels.title: RBAC Overhead Impact

panels.description: Dashboard API response latency. Directly impacts user-perceived load time.
panels.title: Dashboard Load Performance

panels.description: Dashboard search API latency. Slow search degrades the explore/navigation experience.
panels.title: Search Performance

panels.description: Datasource proxy traffic. Each query execution goes through this path.
panels.title: Datasource Proxy Request Rate

panels.description: Proxy error rate indicates datasource connectivity issues. Directly impacts query experience.
panels.title: Datasource Proxy Error Rate

panels.description: Total number of dashboards across all organizations.
panels.title: Total Dashboards

panels.description: Total number of playlists configured.
panels.title: Total Playlists

panels.description: Total number of alert rules configured across all organizations.
panels.title: Total Alert Rules

panels.description: Number of currently active (firing) alerts.
panels.title: Active Alerts

panels.description: Total number of configured data sources.
panels.title: Total Data Sources

panels.description: Number of currently active user sessions.
panels.title: Active Sessions

title: Grafana Admin — Access & Security Analytics
